text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Forty-seven... forty-eight... forty-nine...<n>Fifty! There!
I spot Bamboo Memory working hard<n>at the gym.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And that's that for today's workout<n>plan! Now,
where's my towel?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, thanks! Phew! I worked up a<n>great sweat
toda—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! That's Oguri! I wonder if<n>she's about to
start training right<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna go take a little<n>look and see if I
can learn from her!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Hup!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! Oguri's as strong as ever!<n>She cranked
out a 500-kilogram<n>bench press like she was
lifting a bag<n>of feathers!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah! Oguri's who I aspire to be<n>like! Seeing
her show off her strength<n>gets me all fired up!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: One, two... three... four.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, now she's doing some barbell<n>squats! Gotta
start with the big three—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I... I can't just sit and watch! I'm<n>overflowing with
motivation!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Watch me, Oguri! I'm nowhere near<n>my limit! I
won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hup, hup... RAAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I've really gotta controlmyself, but...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: HUP!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can't rest when the person I aspire<n>to be is
training so hard!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hoo, hah... All right! Three moresets!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... My whole body feelsstiff and ripped... I really gave it my all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Great job. You must be thirsty. Want<n>some?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! I'd love some!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That really hit the spot! But you've<n>barely worked
up a sweat... That<n>means I've gotta train even
harder!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I can't wait.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
With your guts and energy... I bet<n>you're gonna be
amazing on race<n>day...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Looks like neither of us can<n>wait for the
next race.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
WHOOOOOAAAAA! Absolutely! I can't<n>wait to race
with you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta train and train, and train<n>some more so
I'll be ready to run as<n>fast as I can!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Then why don't we start by building<n>up some
energy? The cafeteria has a<n>bunch of new
seasonal stuff right<n>now.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You're on! Let's getextra-extra-large portions!

The pair leave the gym in high spirits,<n>offering a
glimpse at the intense<n>emotions they inspire in
each other.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Awww yeah! I'm brimming with<n>motivation and
fighting spirit! I'm<n>gonna go for another run!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What? I think you're overdoi—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: TAKE THAAAA—GAH?!

The moment she steps onto the<n>treadmill, Bamboo
Memory flies off it<n>in a dramatic plunge... It looks
like she<n>might have hit her limit after all.
